name: tupl
description: Type-safe SQL facade runtime with schema and provider-based query execution

scripts.build:public: pnpm --filter @tupl/core build && pnpm -r --filter @tupl/provider-drizzle --filter @tupl/provider-ioredis --filter @tupl/provider-kysely --filter @tupl/provider-objection build && pnpm build
scripts.example:drizzle:build: pnpm --filter @tupl/core build && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @tupl/provider-drizzle build && pnpm --dir examples/_shared build && pnpm --dir examples/drizzle build
scripts.example:kysely:build: pnpm --filter @tupl/core build && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @tupl/provider-kysely build && pnpm --dir examples/_shared build && pnpm --dir examples/kysely build
scripts.example:objection:build: pnpm --filter @tupl/core build && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @tupl/provider-objection build && pnpm --dir examples/_shared build && pnpm --dir examples/objection build
scripts.publish:public: pnpm --filter @tupl/core publish --access public && pnpm -r --filter @tupl/provider-drizzle --filter @tupl/provider-ioredis --filter @tupl/provider-kysely --filter @tupl/provider-objection publish --access public && pnpm publish --access public
scripts.publish:public:dry-run: pnpm --filter @tupl/core publish --access public --dry-run && pnpm -r --filter @tupl/provider-drizzle --filter @tupl/provider-ioredis --filter @tupl/provider-kysely --filter @tupl/provider-objection publish --access public --dry-run && pnpm publish --access public --dry-run
